User.title: User
User.description: A user of the ResumeCraft app.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

planType.description: The subscription plan of the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

Resume.title: Resume
Resume.description: A resume created by a user.

id.description: The unique ID of the resume.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this resume.

title.description: The title of the resume (e.g., 'Software Engineer Resume').

templateId.description: The ID of the template used for this resume.

content.description: The JSON content of the resume (sections, fields, etc.).

customization.description: The customization settings for the resume.

lastEdited.description: When the resume was last edited.

isDeleted.description: Whether the resume is marked as deleted.

Template.title: Template
Template.description: A resume template available in the gallery.

id.description: The unique ID of the template.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL of the template's thumbnail image.

styles.description: The CSS styles associated with the template.

layout.description: The HTML/JSX layout structure of the template.
